overall.description: A first-person perspective moving upstream through a shallow rocky mountain stream in a forested rural area. The camera passes a traditional wooden house perched on the left bank before approaching and passing beneath a rustic log bridge on an overcast day.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream bed with forested banks and traditional house

agents.ego_description: wading steadily upstream through the shallow rocky stream

entered.detail: shallow water flowing over smooth stones and rocks
rustic wooden structure with sloped roof perched on the hillside
thick green trees and bushes lining the stream bank
wooden bridge structure visible in the distance spanning the stream

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily through a shallow rocky stream on an overcast day. A traditional wooden house sits on the forested left bank while dense vegetation lines both sides of the water. In the distance, a rustic log bridge spans the stream.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested stream corridor approaching wooden bridge

events.description: traditional wooden house passes out of view behind the left bank

agents.ego_description: continuing upstream through the stream as the bridge approaches

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the forested stream corridor, the traditional house disappears from view behind the left bank. The rustic log bridge grows larger in the frame as the camera approaches, and the right bank transitions from grass to exposed rock.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching and passing under wooden log bridge

events.description: camera approaches the stone abutments and enters beneath the log bridge

agents.ego_description: passing underneath the rustic log bridge through the stream

entered.detail: stone supports at the base of the bridge on the left bank
stone supports at the base of the bridge on the right bank

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the wooden bridge, revealing its construction of stacked logs and stone abutments. Passing underneath, the bridge structure fills the overhead view while the stream continues flowing beneath it into the forest beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement upstream through a shallow rocky stream that transitions from an open riverside view to the enclosed space beneath a rustic bridge. It begins by gliding past a traditional wooden house nestled on a forested left bank under an overcast sky, with dense vegetation lining the water. As the camera moves deeper into the corridor, the house disappears behind the bank and the right side of the stream shifts from grass to exposed rock. The scene then focuses on a rustic log bridge that grows larger in the frame, revealing its stacked logs and stone abutments. Finally, the camera passes directly underneath the bridge, with the heavy wooden structure filling the overhead view before the stream opens back up into the forest beyond.
